---
title: "Edward Eames"
---

## Edward Eames

**Dates:** (b.1849/50)

### Description

auctioneer and surveyor

### Biography

He bought Silkstead Priors in Compton parish and was living there in the 1901 census.

### Letters

- Letter from April 27 [1892[[footnote:1]]].
- Letter from April 9th [late 1890s?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
